displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #27: Worst Among Equals Part II
synopsis: WORST AMONG EQUALS: PART TWO! Rogue archaeologist DOCTOR APHRA has ten hours to cross a hostile megacity before the bomb implanted in her throat blows up. No big deal, right? And even if there ARE, say, insane cops and bounty hunters on her tail—she's got a partner to help her! (Unfortunately that would be TRIPLE ZERO: the astonishingly unpleasant murder droid who yearns to see her dead)
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #27: Worst Among Equals Part II
